# Coral Query Plane

Coral Query Plane is a hosted remote MCP for AI SDK data query MCP.

Website: https://coralquery.clauxel.com/
Docs pattern reference: https://github.com/clauxel/MiroFish
Primary keyword: AI SDK data query MCP
Type: MCP
Default plan: team
MCP endpoint: https://coralquery.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://coralquery.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Registry name: com.clauxel.coralquery/coralquery-mcp
Tools: source_list, query_run, schema_preview, result_receipt

Public boundary: docs-only repository; no production source code or secrets.
